meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve can't debug code (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't debug code. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Antigravity Project Template for Debugging
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with bugs. Learn how to use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to debug your first app like a senior engineer.
content.answer_block: Debugging isn't about trial and error; it's about systemizing your environment. By leveraging the Antigravity project template, you gain a pre-configured architecture that isolates logic from UI. Pair this with Claude Code to automate trace analysis, turning hours of frustration into a streamlined, AI-assisted diagnostic workflow for your projects.
content.intro:
The screen glows, the cursor blinks, and your code—which worked five minutes ago—is now throwing an cryptic error you can't decipher. You feel that familiar tension: the 'beginner's wall' where momentum dies and impostor syndrome begins to creep in. Every developer has been here, staring at a stack trace that looks like a foreign language.

But here is the secret: senior engineers don't debug harder; they debug smarter. By adopting the Antigravity project template, you move from manual guesswork to a structured, modular framework. This isn't just about fixing a bug; it's about upgrading your development stack so you can build with professional-grade confidence.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Template
steps.description: Start by cloning the boilerplate. This template enforces strict directory separation, ensuring your business logic is decoupled from your presentation layer.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity clean-architecture template for a standard web application.

steps.title: Automate Trace Analysis
steps.description: Feed your error logs directly into Claude Code. The goal is to identify the root cause by mapping the error back to the specific function call in your Antigravity structure.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the following stack trace and map it to the corresponding module in the Antigravity project architecture.

steps.title: Isolate Logic with Unit Tests
steps.description: Use the template's built-in test harness to verify your fix. This prevents regression errors when you modify complex logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a unit test for the failing module identified in the previous step using the Antigravity test pattern.

steps.title: Refactor via AI-Assisted Diff
steps.description: Apply the fix using a controlled diff. This keeps your codebase clean and allows for easy rollbacks if needed.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Apply a safe code fix for the identified bug that adheres to the Antigravity architectural guidelines.

steps.title: Final Integration Validation
steps.description: Run the full project suite to ensure the fix hasn't impacted other components, verifying your app is ready for deployment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run the full integration suite and verify that the Antigravity project template constraints are still satisfied.

pro_tips: Always treat your error logs as data points, not just text; pipe them into Claude Code as JSON for better parsing.
The Antigravity template thrives on modularity; if a module grows over 200 lines, split it to simplify future debugging.
Use Claude Code's --dry-run flag before applying any automated fixes to see exactly what lines of code will change.
Document your debugging process inside a 'debug.md' file within your template to build a knowledge base for future you.
Prioritize 'silent failures'—use the Antigravity logging middleware to catch errors before they reach the UI layer.
content.next_steps: Once you have successfully debugged your first module, begin refactoring your entire project to adhere strictly to the Antigravity architectural patterns, then deploy to a staging environment.
content.conversion_block: You are now equipped with the tools and the mindset to crush any bug that dares to slow your progress. Stop fighting your code and start architecting your success. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
